text:
User: What is the current stock price of Apple?
Model: <thought>
Context: Factual query regarding real-time data.
Action: BROWSE! -> https://www.google.com/search?q=apple+stock+price
</thought>
@LOGIC! SOURCE:https://www.google.com/search?q=apple+stock+price
Apple Inc. (AAPL) is currently trading at $172.62 (example data).
@END_LOGIC!
Based on real-time data, Apple's stock price is $172.62.

User: Summarize the latest news about the OMNI-500 project.

</thought>

@END_LOGIC!
The latest update shows that OMNI-500 now features a real-time web-augmented reasoning system.

User: Who won the game last night?
Model: <thought>
Context: Recent event retrieval.
Action: BROWSE! -> https://www.google.com/search?q=sports+scores+last+night
</thought>
@LOGIC! SOURCE:https://www.google.com/search?q=sports+scores+last+night
The Lakers won against the Warriors 112-105.
@END_LOGIC!
Last night, the Lakers defeated the Warriors with a final score of 112-105.
